_comment: Single source of truth for what MarkItDown accepts. Read by the Python service (enforced on /convert, exposed at /policy) and by the Node app/UI. Already-text formats (.txt/.md/.json/.xml), image formats, and audio/video files are intentionally excluded — text is already AI-ready; images/audio/video yield no usable text without OCR/LLM captioning.

tokenSavings._comment: saved ≈ (fileBytes × density / charsPerToken) − (markdownChars / charsPerToken). density = fraction of the original file that is raw extractable text you'd otherwise feed an AI.
